refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for each phase of the load→travel→dump cycle to meet the customer-defined target.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the overall cycle time KPI into sub-FRs for each phase allows targeted design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for load, travel, and dump phases separately under representative duty cycles and site conditions.
sub_frs: Minimize load phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize travel phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize dump phase cycle time to meet target

candidate_dps: Optimize vehicle mechanical and control systems for load phase speed
Optimize vehicle navigation and path planning for travel phase
Optimize vehicle dumping mechanism and timing for dump phase
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize vehicle mechanical and control systems for load phase speed; Optimize vehicle navigation and path planning for travel phase; Optimize vehicle dumping mechanism and timing for dump phase

potential_sources: Interdependence between phases due to vehicle state transitions
Shared control algorithms affecting multiple phases
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically separable by cycle phase but require coordination at vehicle control level.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle subsystems can be optimized independently without negative cross-phase impact
Risk that optimization in one phase may degrade performance in another if not coordinated
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit coordination DP or interface to manage phase transitions and control handoff.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and control systems responsible for executing load, travel, and dump phases

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends cycle time and status data to NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives commands and cycle parameters from NGHE Solution or Teleoperation

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communication channel for control and monitoring data exchange

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle module fully contains the physical and control DPs for cycle phases with minimal diffusion.
NGHE Solution oversees coordination but does not directly implement cycle phase controls.
Teleoperation may influence cycle timing but is not primary implementer.
Safety Services monitors but does not implement cycle time functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning cycle time optimization DPs to Vehicle module centralizes control and minimizes diffusion, enabling clear ownership and efficient implementation.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in Vehicle module due to integrating multiple phase optimizations
Coordination with NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules needed to avoid interface mismatches
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and coordination protocols between Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement into load, travel, and dump phases aligns well with selected DPs targeting each phase.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk exists if Vehicle module becomes too complex managing all phases
Coordination interfaces must be well defined to prevent cross-module coupling
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment scores for cycle time DPs, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring cycle times at Vehicle module outputs and correlating with FR targets.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time optimization to Vehicle module supports ownership and verification.

recommended_revisions: Add explicit coordination DP/interface for phase transitions
Strengthen interface definitions between Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignment meets criteria with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment. Risks are manageable with recommended interface clarifications.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize load phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize travel phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize dump phase cycle time to meet target

revise.why: To introduce explicit coordination DP/interface managing phase transitions and control handoff.

assumptions: Vehicle subsystems can be optimized independently per phase
Interfaces between Vehicle and NGHE Solution will be clearly defined
evidence_needed: Performance data validating phase-specific cycle time improvements
